retrieved_result: Incomparable \"Incomparable Webster's 1913 Dictionary In`com´pa`ra`blea. 1. Not comparable; admitting of no comparison with others; unapproachably eminent; without apeer or equal; matchless; peerless; transcendent. A merchant of incomparable wealth. - Shak. A new hypothesis . . . which hath the incomparable Sir I
